nodes.label: Data Types
nodes.description: Numeric, text, date/time types; type coercion; NULL semantics

nodes.label: SELECT Basics
nodes.description: Retrieving rows and columns; column aliases; SELECT *; DISTINCT

nodes.label: Filtering with WHERE
nodes.description: Comparison and logical operators; NULL handling with IS NULL; IN, BETWEEN, LIKE

nodes.label: ORDER BY & LIMIT
nodes.description: Sorting result sets; ascending/descending; LIMIT and OFFSET for pagination

nodes.label: Aggregate Functions
nodes.description: COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX; DISTINCT in aggregates; NULL in aggregation

nodes.label: GROUP BY & HAVING
nodes.description: Grouping rows into buckets; filtering groups with HAVING vs filtering rows with WHERE

nodes.label: DML — INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE
nodes.description: Modifying data; UPSERT / ON CONFLICT; returning affected rows

nodes.label: INNER JOIN
nodes.description: Joining two tables on a matching key; equi-joins; multi-table joins

nodes.label: Outer JOINs
nodes.description: LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER JOIN; NULL-extended rows; finding unmatched records

nodes.label: Self JOIN
nodes.description: Joining a table to itself; modeling hierarchies; table aliasing

nodes.label: Subqueries
nodes.description: Scalar, row, and table subqueries; correlated subqueries; EXISTS and IN

nodes.label: Set Operations
nodes.description: UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT / MINUS; deduplication rules; column alignment

nodes.label: Schema Design
nodes.description: Primary and foreign keys; referential integrity; ON DELETE / ON UPDATE actions

nodes.label: CTEs
nodes.description: WITH clause; multi-step readable queries; recursive CTEs for hierarchies

nodes.label: Window Functions — Basics
nodes.description: OVER(); ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK; PARTITION BY; ORDER BY inside a frame

nodes.label: Normalization
nodes.description: 1NF–3NF / BCNF; functional dependencies; trade-offs with denormalization

nodes.label: Indexes & Query Plans
nodes.description: B-tree vs hash indexes; covering indexes; EXPLAIN / EXPLAIN ANALYZE; selectivity

nodes.label: Window Functions — Frames
nodes.description: ROWS / RANGE frames; LAG, LEAD; running totals; moving averages; NTILE

nodes.label: Transactions & ACID
nodes.description: BEGIN / COMMIT / ROLLBACK; isolation levels; dirty reads, phantom reads, lost updates
